dashboard.title: Protein Suite
dashboard.subtitle: Static educational environment for protein catalogs, FASTA sequence analysis, and biochemical property study with declared sources.

catalog.title: Protein Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Curated dataset from UniProtKB reviewed entries with real PDB cross-references, filterable by category, organism, and family.
catalog.liveSource: Data loaded live from the UniProt REST API and not stored in the repository.
catalog.noLiveFunction: Function annotation is not available in the live record.
catalog.noLiveLocation: Localization annotation is not available in the live record.

explorer.title: Protein Explorer
explorer.subtitle: Explore one catalog protein, compare it with a second record, and fetch live UniProt annotations when needed.
explorer.noRelated: No related record in the local dataset.
explorer.name: Name
explorer.liveNotice: Annotations loaded live from the UniProt REST API; they are not stored in the repository.
explorer.noLiveFunction: Function annotation is not available in the live record.
explorer.noLiveLocation: Localization annotation is not available in the live record.

lab.title: Protein Lab
lab.subtitle: FASTA analysis with declared biochemical methods: mass, net charge, pI, GRAVY, aromaticity, and instability index.
lab.empty: Enter a protein sequence or FASTA record.
lab.validationError: The sequence contains symbols that cannot be calculated.
lab.sourceMass: Molecular weight: sum of residue masses plus water, with average and monoisotopic sets declared in data/protein-constants.json.
lab.sourceCharge: Net charge and pI: titration curve with declared ExPASy/EMBOSS-style pKa values.
lab.sourceHydro: Hydrophobicity: Kyte-Doolittle scale, J. Mol. Biol. 157:105-132 (1982).
lab.sourceInstability: Instability index: Guruprasad, Reddy, and Pandit (1990), DIWV matrix declared in JSON.

statistics.title: Statistics Center
statistics.subtitle: Quantitative summary of the validated local catalog: categories, organisms, families, lengths, and PDB references.

fasta.title: FASTA Manager
fasta.subtitle: Import single or multiple FASTA records, validate the protein alphabet, normalize sequences, and export a clean file.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Center
knowledge.subtitle: Bilingual Markdown documentation with teaching level, scientific level, sources, and tool links.

footer.idea: From an idea by Massimo Bianchini (CNR-IFAC)
footer.data: Data: UniProtKB (CC BY 4.0) · RCSB PDB · properties computed locally
footer.disclaimer: Independent educational project, not affiliated with the referenced institutions.
